archetype: Pastel & Soft (Archetype 3) mixed with Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1)
design_philosophy: A beautiful, dreamy, and highly editorial Bakery Management System inspired by Bloominstudio. Focuses on soft pastel palettes (cream, blush pink, sage, dusty lavender), elegant serif typography paired with clean sans-serif, generous whitespace, organic shapes, and fluid, high-end scroll animations. The UI should feel less like a rigid SaaS dashboard and more like an immersive, high-end bakery catalog that just happens to have management capabilities.

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF8F5]/80 border-b border-[#EAE4DC]/50 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#3A3532] text-[#FAF8F5] px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#2C2927] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-[#F4EBE6] text-[#3A3532] px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#E8C4C4] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-[#EAE4DC] shadow-[0_10px_40px_-20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_-15px_rgba(232,196,196,0.3)]

inputs.base: w-full bg-[#FAF8F5] border-none rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E8C4C4] text-[#3A3532] transition-shadow placeholder:text-[#A39B93]

toast.classes: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#EAE4DC] shadow-[0_20px_40px_-15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] p-4 text-[#3A3532]

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for buttery smooth momentum scrolling. Required for the Bloominstudio feel.

hero_background.description: Dreamy soft peach pink background with bright sun, ideal for wallpapers.
hero_background.usage: Use as a full-bleed or large rounded container background for the hero section, with an overlay or gradient to ensure text readability.

auth_image.description: A white cake on a white pedestal, elegant and minimalist.
auth_image.usage: Use in the split-screen Google Sign-In page to represent the high-end bakery aesthetic.

decorative_bg.description: Soft abstract gradient background in pink and yellow hues.
decorative_bg.usage: Use as a subtle blurred background texture behind order history or dashboard areas.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn borders or hard corners. Override the radius variables to map to large values (e.g., 1.5rem for cards).
Use Framer Motion to wrap page sections for smooth fade and slide-up reveals on scroll. The site must feel cinematic and soft.
For the Orders page cart area, use a sticky sidebar layout if possible, displaying items gracefully with plenty of negative space.
Never use pure black text. Use the provided #2C2927 or #3A3532.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all buttons, inputs, and major layout sections.
Implement Google Sign-In button using standard UI practices but style it to fit the elegant theme if using a custom wrapper.
Ensure the hero section text overlaps the background image beautifully, using a very light white/cream gradient overlay if contrast is needed.
Replace standard toast notification styles with the customized 'toast' styles defined above.
